summary: Fuzzy-decompiled the remaining stage-select menu entry function, mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter, and reorganized supporting static data/types so mnstagesel worked in a nonmatching build. The decomp.dev bot reported one unmatched-function improvement: mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter went from 0.00% to 87.90% for 3311 bytes. The PR also tightened related prototypes, symbol metadata, archive/static model structs, and SSSData field usage.

key_files.role: Main implementation change; added the fuzzy decompilation of mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter, helper do_anim, include updates, and SSSData field-name usage in OnFrame/OnLeave.
Moved/expanded file-local structs, static globals, constants, and stage list data out of the C file; introduced typed StaticModelDesc layout for mnStageSel_804D6C98.
Adjusted fn_8025A974 prototype from u32 unused to int unused to match implementation.
Corrected symbol data classifications and split formerly broad string/data symbols into individual labels.

what_changed: Implemented mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter as a large fuzzy match instead of leaving it as a stub/non-decompiled function.

Added OnEnter setup for loading MnSlMap.usd or MnSlMap.dat depending on lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS, resolving MnSelectStageDataTable from the archive, and initializing camera, light, fog, and stage-select model objects.
Added object creation and animation setup paths using HSD_CObjLoadDesc, HSD_LObjLoadDesc, HSD_FogLoadDesc, HSD_JObjLoadJoint, HSD_JObjAddAnimAll, GObj_SetupGXLink, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54.

Added per-stage JObj setup loops that bind stage button models to anchor JObjs, set visibility flags for unavailable stages, request animation frames for available/unlocked states, and stop animations with HSD_ForeachAnim.
Factored a repeated animation idiom into static helper do_anim: request base animation, request flagged frame, animate all, then stop TOBJ animations.
Replaced ad-hoc mnStageSel_804D6C90 struct fields with SSSData and named fields such as force_stage_id, no_lras, start_game, unk_stage, and data.data.rules.xE.
Changed mnStageSel_804D6C98 from a partially unknown archive-data struct with UNK_T slots to a typed sequence of StaticModelDesc entries x0 through xA0 plus joint/anim pointers at xB0/xB4/xB8/xBC.
Moved struct stagelistinfo, mnStageSel_803F06D0, static globals, StageSelUserData, MAX_ITER, and NUM_STAGES into mnstagesel.static.h.
Added static const Vec3 mnStageSel_803B8550 = { 0, -13, 0 } and updated symbols.txt to classify mnStageSel_803B8550 as float data.
Split mnStageSel_803F0A18 into lbl_803F0A18, lbl_803F0A24, and lbl_803F0A30 string symbols, and renamed two sdata strings to lbl_804D50B4 and lbl_804D50BC.
Updated includes: mnstagesel.h now precedes mnstagesel.static.h; added lobj.h, gmmain_lib.h, and lblanguage.h; switched away from gm_1A36.h in this diff excerpt.
Adjusted fn_8025A974 signature from u32 unused to int unused in both C and header.
smart_moves: Converted the archive payload layout to StaticModelDesc fields before writing the large OnEnter body, making accesses like x30.joint, x30.animjoint, x30.matanim_joint, and x30.shapeanim_joint self-documenting and safer than raw UNK_T offsets.
Reused a small do_anim helper for the repeated HSD_JObjReqAnimAll/HSD_JObjReqAnimAllByFlags/HSD_JObjAnimAll/HSD_ForeachAnim pattern, reducing noise in matching-sensitive stage-button setup code.
Used existing SSSData/scene types instead of preserving a local guessed struct, which improved semantic field names and made OnFrame/OnLeave changes clearer.

Preserved matching-sensitive structure in the large function with local scoped blocks, explicit temporaries, PAD_STACK, and fallthrough comments, indicating a pragmatic fuzzy-match approach rather than over-refactoring.
Updated symbols.txt alongside the C/header changes so rodata/sdata interpretation matched the new source layout, especially for float vectors and split string labels.
decomp_lessons: For large menu entry functions, getting a functional fuzzy match may require reconstructing the archive data table layout first; typed model descriptors can unlock many JObj/animation calls at once.
When replacing a guessed local scene-data struct, prefer existing project-wide types such as SSSData if they explain fields used across OnEnter, OnFrame, and OnLeave.

Stage-select UI setup is heavily data-driven: archive StaticModelDesc entries, JObj sibling chains, and per-stage table entries all interact, so keep static tables and struct sizes close to the implementation.

Animation state setup often requires the exact sequence of HSD_JObjReqAnimAll, HSD_JObjReqAnimAllByFlags, HSD_JObjAnimAll, and HSD_ForeachAnim(... HSD_AObjStopAnim ...); this pattern is reusable in other menu decompilation work.
Symbol metadata should be revisited when decompiling data-heavy menu code; a single broad string symbol may need to become several lbl_* symbols, and vector constants may need float classification.
Guarding STATIC_ASSERT with #ifndef M2CTX can keep useful size checks in normal builds while avoiding context-generation problems.
naming_conventions: Address-derived names were retained for still-unknown functions/globals, e.g. mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter, mnStageSel_804D6C98, and fn_8025A974.
Unknown or split strings in symbols.txt were named with lbl_ address labels rather than mnStageSel_* when no semantic name was established, e.g. lbl_803F0A18 and lbl_804D50B4.
The local archive layout struct kept offset-style field names x0, x10, x20, ..., xA0 while improving each field type to StaticModelDesc.
Existing higher-level scene names were preferred where available: SSSData, force_stage_id, no_lras, start_game, and data.data.rules.xE.
The stage table struct remains descriptive but still partly offset-based: struct stagelistinfo with fields x0, x4, x8, x9, xA, xB, xC, x10, x14, and x18.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used a fuzzy match for mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter rather than claiming a full exact match; bot evidence reported 87.90% after the PR.
Preserved stack-shaping evidence with PAD_STACK(0xDC - 0x38) in OnEnter.
Kept local scoped blocks around GObj/JObj setup sequences, likely to influence register lifetimes and stack layout in the large function.
Used explicit temporary variables such as temp_r22_4, temp_r23_3, temp_r22_7, and temp_r3_16 in the diff excerpt, consistent with matching-oriented decomp style.
Inserted explicit /* fallthrough */ comments in switch cases where stage availability logic intentionally flows into hidden/disabled handling.
Matched callback prototype details by changing fn_8025A974's unused parameter type to int.
Stopped animations after frame selection via HSD_ForeachAnim with JOBJ_TYPE/TOBJ_MASK or ALL_TYPE_MASK and HSD_AObjStopAnim, preserving runtime behavior for static menu poses.

review_feedback.feedback: Author stated that mnstagesel now appears to be fully functional in a nonmatching build.
Reported 1 improvement in unmatched functions: main/melee/mn/mnstagesel mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter, 3311 bytes, 0.00% before and 87.90% after.
No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that exact-match mnStageSel_8025A998_OnEnter after this 87.90% fuzzy match.
Search for other menu archive data structs using StaticModelDesc sequences to compare layout naming and reuse.
Check whether mnStageSel_804D6C98_t fields x0 through xA0 later received semantic names.
Search for other uses of SSSData force_stage_id, no_lras, start_game, and data.data.rules.xE in scene/menu code.
Review later changes to config/GALE01/symbols.txt around mnStageSel_803F0A18 and lbl_804D50B4 for symbol renames or semantic labels.
